restoration_benefit.source_quote: 27. Reload of Sum Insured We shall provide for a Reload of the Sum Insured, unlimited times during the Policy Year up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule/ Certificate of Insurance / Product Benefit Table of this Policy, in case the available Sum Insured, is insufficient for covering a claim under the Policy as a result of previous claims in that Policy Year.
